summary: Ingress terminal does not recover after a brief connection loss
expected_behavior: The existing terminal session should become usable again after connectivity returns.
actual_behavior: The reconnect indicator remained visible while a fresh session opened normally.
reproduction_steps: Open an authenticated Ingress terminal session.
Briefly interrupt the client connection without stopping the App.
Restore connectivity and observe the existing session.
cause_candidates: Unconfirmed: the existing Ingress client reconnect state may not be clearing after transport recovery.
Unconfirmed: the failure may be limited to the original terminal session rather than the App service.

checks.name: Fresh session control
checks.evidence: A fresh terminal session opened and accepted input.

checks.name: Existing session reconnect
checks.evidence: The existing session remained on its reconnect indicator.

checks.name: Mobile client comparison
checks.evidence: No mobile client was available for this observation.

checks.name: Restart recovery
checks.evidence: Restarting the App was outside the read-only validation scope.

evidence: The first reconnect attempt remained pending.
A fresh terminal session remained available during the same observation.
unverified_scope: The behavior on a mobile client was not observed.
No restart or update path was exercised.
